summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/03/2026
Today， DCE iron ore fluctuated upward today. The most-traded I2605 contract finally closed at 815.5 yuan/mt,up 1.05% from the previous trading session. Spot prices rose by about 4-7 yuan from the previous trading day.
